step_by_step_thinking:
Porosity due to improper handling during the processing of methyl methacrylate would more likely appear near the borders rather than throughout the denture, in the thickest parts, or specifically on the surface because the issue arises primarily from premature contact with the mold which affects areas closer to the edges first before spreading evenly across other regions.
\boxed{B} Based on the context given about porosity occurring when flasks are placed prematurely leading to uneven distribution issues typically starting nearer to boundaries, option B best fits the described scenario.
